name: perspective
description: An AI Concierge replaces static forms with adaptive AI conversations that understand real situations, structure key information automatically, and trigger the right next step.
long_description: Perspective AI replaces static surveys, forms, and manual interviews with intelligent AI agents (Concierge, Interviewer, Evaluator, Advocate) that have natural, deep conversations with your customers, then synthesizes the results into actionable insights. With this extension, your AI assistant can create conversation agents, analyze conversations, deploy embeds, and automate follow-ups without leaving your IDE or desktop client.

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Your Perspective AI MCP access token. Generate one at Settings > MCP.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Perspective AI MCP server URL (only change for self-hosted instances)

tools.name: workspace_list
tools.description: List all workspaces you can access

tools.name: workspace_get
tools.description: Get details for a workspace

tools.name: workspace_get_default
tools.description: Get your default workspace

tools.name: perspective_list
tools.description: List perspectives in a workspace, or search by name across all workspaces

tools.name: perspective_get
tools.description: Get full configuration and stats for a perspective

tools.name: perspective_create
tools.description: Create a new perspective from a natural-language brief

tools.name: perspective_respond
tools.description: Answer a follow-up question during perspective design

tools.name: perspective_update
tools.description: Refine a perspective with natural-language feedback

tools.name: perspective_await_job
tools.description: Long-poll a perspective design job to completion

tools.name: perspective_get_preview_link
tools.description: Get a shareable preview URL for testing before deployment

tools.name: perspective_get_embed_options
tools.description: Get embed snippets (fullpage, widget, popup, slider, float, card) and the SDK reference

tools.name: perspective_get_stats
tools.description: Aggregate stats and distributions over a time window

tools.name: perspective_list_conversations
tools.description: List conversations with filters by status, trust score, and date

tools.name: perspective_get_conversation
tools.description: Get full conversation details, including transcript and trust assessment

tools.name: perspective_get_conversations
tools.description: Token-efficient batch fetch of conversations for bulk analysis

tools.name: participant_invite
tools.description: Create 48-hour magic-link invites for participants, optionally sent via email

tools.name: automation_list
tools.description: List automations on a perspective with status and metadata

tools.name: automation_create
tools.description: Create an automation (webhook, email, Slack, HubSpot)

tools.name: automation_update
tools.description: Update fields on an existing automation

tools.name: automation_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an automation

tools.name: automation_test
tools.description: Run an end-to-end test of an automation against a mock conversation

tools.name: integration_manage
tools.description: List providers (Slack, HubSpot), connect them, and search their tools
